_comment: DRAKE — Royal League Elite Four (Dragon) intro. A per-leader copy of the Cicada scene (takehara_leader_intro.json), reusing its relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 geometry VERBATIM so gym/engage_royal_elite_4 still opens the battle from the endBack:7 stage-back. Camera path is leader-agnostic: pull up over the challenger's shoulder framing Drake, a TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to his face (the z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds mirror the Cicada push-in), a high side-profile sweep, then drop home. startTitle names him; a Dragon-type effect layer — ender_dragon growl/flap + portal.trigger swells, with dragon_breath then flame particles at the zoom — sells The Last Wyrm. Particles anchor off the CHALLENGER'S look frame (`execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7`) since Drake has no fixed uuid; that's a best-effort placement toward where the leader hovers (~7 blocks ahead). IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: air-verify at the real Royal League arena and nudge the ^-offset + the zoom-keyframe framing so the breath/flame land ON Drake. endBack 7 MUST stay to match the shared engage function.

cues.command: execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:dragon_breath ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:flame ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
